name: Kabbalistic Tree of Life ob3ect: 10 Sephirot (Kether, Chokmah, Binah, Chesed, Geburah, Tiferet, Netzach, Hod, Yesod, Malkuth) and 22 connecting paths. FSPLIT: the Lightning Flash emanates from Kether down through all 10 Sephirot — Ein Sof splits into the tree of manifestation. FFUSE: the Serpent Path ascends from Malkuth back to Kether — multiplicity reconstitutes original unity. VINIT: Ain Soph Aur (limitless light before emanation). TANCH: the complete Tree diagram. AFWD: the lightning flash descent. AREV: the serpent path ascent. ENGAGR: Daath — the hidden sephirah that simultaneously IS and IS NOT on the tree.

phase_0.domain_name: Kabbalistic Tree of Life ob3ect: 10 Sephirot (Kether, Chokmah, Binah, Chesed, Geburah, Tiferet, Netzach, Hod, Yesod, Malkuth) and 22 connecting paths. FSPLIT: the Lightning Flash emanates from Kether down through all 10 Sephirot — Ein Sof splits into the tree of manifestation. FFUSE: the Serpent Path ascends from Malkuth back to Kether — multiplicity reconstitutes original unity. VINIT: Ain Soph Aur (limitless light before emanation). TANCH: the complete Tree diagram. AFWD: the lightning flash descent. AREV: the serpent path ascent. ENGAGR: Daath — the hidden sephirah that simultaneously IS and IS NOT on the tree.

VINIT.justification: limitless light before any emanation, the void prior to manifestation

TANCH.justification: the closed boundary that contains all Sephirot and paths

AFWD.justification: forward morphism from Kether down to Malkuth

AREV.justification: reverse/descent morphism from Malkuth back to Kether

CLINK.justification: they compose the Sephirot into a sequential network

IMSCRIB.justification: each Sephirah is itself, a unique divine attribute

FSPLIT.justification: Ein Sof splits into 10 distinct Sephirot as it emanates downward

FFUSE.justification: ascends through all Sephirot, reconstituting the original unity of Ein Sof

EVALF.justification: failure state where light is blocked or distorted

ENGAGR.justification: the hidden Sephirah that simultaneously IS and IS NOT on the tree

IFIX.chosen_element: the fixed order of the Sephirot
IFIX.justification: the emanation sequence is permanent and irreversible

phase_3.void_description: Ain Soph Aur — unmanifest potential before any emanation
phase_3.true_description: a Sephirah fully illuminated by divine light
phase_3.false_description: a Qliphah — a shell that blocks or distorts light
phase_3.both_description: Daath — simultaneously present and absent, known and unknown

steps.domain_action: Step 1 IMSCRIB: the meditator recognizes the self as a microcosm of the Tree
Step 2 AREV:   the meditator descends from Kether to Malkuth via the Lightning Flash
Step 3 FSPLIT: the meditator separates the 10 Sephirot in contemplation
Step 4 AFWD:   the meditator ascends from Malkuth to Kether via the Serpent Path
Step 5 FFUSE:  the meditator unifies all Sephirot back into Ein Sof
Step 6 CLINK:  the meditator links each Sephirah through the 22 paths
Step 7 IFIX:   the meditator records the vision in a fixed diagram
Step 8 IMSCRIB: the meditator recognizes the self as the Tree itself

phase_5.ipc_mechanism: the flow of divine light between Sephirot
phase_5.memory_mechanism: the fixed order of the Sephirot and paths
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: the order of emanation (Kether to Malkuth) and return (Malkuth to Kether)
phase_5.alfs_store: the Zohar — the canonical text of Kabbalistic lore

phase_6.post_cycle_state: the meditator in unitive consciousness with the Tree
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the cycle of emanation and return is a closed loop, conserving spiritual energy
